zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Griggs於1569年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特 煙雨 波泰德時，他的父親Henry Griggs31歲，母親Alice Boston28歲。他於1598年與Anne Sterling在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年3月1日在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Griggs was born in 1569, in Hartest with Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Griggs, was 31 and his mother, Alice Boston, was 28. He married Anne Sterling in 1598, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 March 1605, in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Anne Sterling en 1598, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. ko.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트 위스 보스테드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Griggs(이)가 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트 위스 보스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Griggs(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Boston(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1598년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Anne Sterling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 3월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트에 묻혔다.

ru.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: хартест вит бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Griggs родился в 1569 г. в местности хартест вит бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Griggs было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Boston, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Sterling в 1598 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 марта 1605 г. в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
